pr_text:
## Title: Fix malformed IPv6 address formatting in NAS ESM module

### Summary
The `esm_data_get_ipv6_addr()` function in the NAS ESM module was producing malformed IPv6 address strings due to incorrect format specifiers (`%x%.2x`) and incomplete address processing. The implementation only consumed the first 8 bytes of the 16-byte IPv6 address, resulting in truncated, non-standard addresses in PDN connectivity logs and potentially corrupted signaling messages. This caused confusion during UE att
